title: Gestion Velora SEO audit issues (repo-native)
sourceConfidenceNote: Repo inspection [HIGH]. Live index counts, CWV field data, and GSC query splits require Search Console export [MEDIUM].

issues.title: Large programmatic location URL set may trigger scaled-content scrutiny
issues.description: Many URLs are generated from CITIES × LOCATION_SERVICES × locales (see src/data/locations.ts, prerender). Without clearly distinct on-page value per URL, this pattern aligns with doorway/thin-page risk factors described in Google's scaled content abuse and Helpful Content guidance.
evidence: src/data/locations.ts exports CITIES and LOCATION_SERVICES; LOCATION_SLUGS cross-product.
scripts/prerender.ts emits static HTML + sitemap entries for each route.
Build output: sitemap URL count ~560 (last local build log).
recommendedActions: Freeze net-new city×service URLs until each existing template passes a uniqueness rubric (local proof, data, or FAQ depth).
Partial mitigation shipped: CITIES reduced to core Greater Montreal; optional factual localLead paragraphs on priority municipalities; Vercel redirects from removed URL suffixes to /locations.
Sample 30 lowest-impression location URLs in GSC; merge, noindex, or substantially rewrite underperformers.
Prefer one high-quality locations hub + dynamic UX (e.g. user-selected city) over continued static multiplication.
issues.rollback: Reduce CITIES list and rebuild; or add selective robots noindex for experimental subsets after controlled test.
issues.verification: GSC: Pages report + URL Inspection on 10 random /location/* URLs; manual content diff review.

issues.title: Ensure single JSON-LD authority per page type
issues.description: Runtime SchemaOrg and prerender schemas must not duplicate the same @type for one URL. FAQ fixed in 709f00b; audit other templates if similar patterns appear.
recommendedActions: Per route: choose prerender OR runtime schema for primary entity, not both.
issues.rollback: Revert dual-injection commits; restore single source.

issues.title: Field Core Web Vitals + INP not captured in repo
issues.description: Performance must be validated with real-user CrUX / Search Console Experience, not only Lighthouse lab scores.
evidence: No automated CrUX fetch in CI—by design (requires GSC API or PSI with URL secrets).
recommendedActions: Export monthly Experience report; annotate deploys in GSC (see seo/gsc-dashboard-handbook.md).
Prioritize LCP/INP on largest templates (home, service, blog post).

issues.title: Discovered vs indexed URL lag after sitemap changes
issues.description: Sitemap URL count can exceed indexed count for weeks; not necessarily an error.
evidence: Operator reports ~376 discovered vs ~560 sitemap lines locally.
recommendedActions: Request indexing for representative URLs only—not bulk spam requests.
issues.verification: URL Inspection + sitemap last read date in GSC
